channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump drops $1.8 billion DOJ fund after rare GOP pushback
item.description: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche says the fund will not move forward after Senate Republicans refused to approve it.

item.title: Artist sues FIFA over alleged illegal painting over of whale mural in Dallas
item.description: The artist claims FIFA painted over his 17,000-square-foot mural without his consent or notification.

item.title: Portugal and Austria win U.N. Security Council seats, defeating Germany
item.description: The 15-member panel includes five permanent members and 10 rotating seats, with Portugal and Austria now joining.

item.title: Dennis Woodside built a Silicon Valley career by tackling tough challenges
item.description: After selling Motorola to Lenovo, Woodside found himself jobless. Now he leads a $2.65 billion software firm.
